query: SELECT aa.id, aa.estimated_vehicle_value, aa.estimated_cost, aa.repair_to_value_ratio, aa.total_loss_indicated, aa.structural_damage_severity, aa.total_loss_reasoning, c.id as claim_id, c.claim_number FROM ai_assessments aa JOIN claims c ON aa.claim_id = c.id LIMIT 3;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zQEb4HwERZa3vD.6f0bc5e32ffe --database YbS42LwGroxbVepAMjk4bS --execute SELECT aa.id, aa.estimated_vehicle_value, aa.estimated_cost, aa.repair_to_value_ratio, aa.total_loss_indicated, aa.structural_damage_severity, aa.total_loss_reasoning, c.id as claim_id, c.claim_number FROM ai_assessments aa JOIN claims c ON aa.claim_id = c.id LIMIT 3;

rows.total_loss_reasoning: Extensive damage: 12 components affected across multiple critical systems
